name: prompt registry validator rejects a duplicate version within a single prompt entry
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf 'prompts:
  - id: x
    versions:
      - version: 1.0.0
      - version: 1.0.0
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'duplicate_version=1.0.0' err.txt && grep -q 'prompt_id=x' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
